CREATE TABLE test_double_precision (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION);
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_double_precision WHERE value > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_double_precision WHERE value < 0;
SELECT id, value FROM test_double_precision WHERE value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_double_precision);
SELECT id, value FROM test_double_precision WHERE (value + 1.0) IN (SELECT value FROM test_double_precision WHERE value < 0);
WITH filtered_values AS (SELECT id, value FROM test_double_precision WHERE value IS NOT NULL) SELECT id, value FROM filtered_values WHERE value BETWEEN -1.0 AND 1.0;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.value AS second_value FROM test_double_precision AS t1 JOIN test_double_precision AS t2 ON t1.id != t2.id WHERE t1.value + t2.value > 1.0;
UPDATE test_double_precision SET value = value * 2 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ROUND(value, 2) AS rounded_value FROM test_double_precision;
SELECT id FROM test_double_precision WHERE value = (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_double_precision WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
